existing.en: something that cures an illness or solves a problem

ex.en: Honey and tea is a common remedy for a sore throat.
ex.ko: 꿀차는 목 아플 때 흔히 쓰는 치료법이다.

existing.en: say or do something again

ex.en: Could you repeat that, please?

wn.def: being or characteristic of government by representation in which citizens exercise power through elected officers and representatives

existing.en: a person chosen to speak or act on behalf of others

ex.en: A representative from the company attended the meeting.

existingFlat.en: a publication (such as a book) that is reprinted without changes or editing and offered again for sale

ex.en: This book is a reprint of the 1980 edition.

wn.def: a formal expression by a meeting

existing.en: find a solution to a problem or disagreement

ex.en: They managed to resolve the conflict peacefully.

existing.en: make a firm decision to do something

ex.en: She resolved to exercise every morning.

wn.def: a summary of your academic and work history

existingFlat.en: take up or begin anew

ex.en: The meeting will resume after lunch.

wn.def: be sold at the retail level

existing.en: the selling of goods to customers in stores, not in large quantities to businesses

ex.en: He works in retail at a clothing store.

wn.def: take revenge for a perceived wrong

existing.en: action taken to hurt someone in return for a wrong they did to you

ex.en: She wanted revenge for what he had done to her.
ex.ko: 그녀는 그가 자신에게 한 짓에 대해 복수하고 싶었다.

wn.def: regard with feelings of respect and reverence

existing.en: a feeling of deep respect or awe for someone or something

ex.en: He spoke of his teacher with great reverence.
ex.ko: 그는 자신의 스승에 대해 깊은 존경심을 담아 말했다.

existing.en: the outer edge of something round, such as a cup, wheel, or glasses

ex.en: She wiped the rim of the glass.

wn.def: an artist of the Romantic Movement or someone influenced by Romanticism

existing.en: relating to or expressing feelings of love

ex.en: They had a romantic dinner by candlelight.
ex.ko: 그들은 촛불 아래에서 낭만적인 저녁 식사를 했다.

existing.en: not sensible or realistic about practical matters

ex.en: His romantic view of farming ignored the hard work involved.
ex.ko: 농사에 대한 그의 이상주의적인 시각은 힘든 노동을 간과했다.

wn.def: provide a building with a roof

existing.en: the covering on top of a building or vehicle

ex.en: Snow covered the roof of the house.

existing.en: an upper limit on an amount, such as prices or spending

ex.en: The government set a roof on rent increases.

wn.def: of something having a dusty purplish pink color

existing.en: a flower with a sweet smell that grows on a bush with thorns

ex.en: He gave her a bouquet of red roses.
ex.ko: 그는 그녀에게 빨간 장미 꽃다발을 주었다.

wn.def: prepare in preliminary or sketchy form
with roughness or violence (`rough' is an informal variant for `roughly')
with rough motion as over a rough surface

existing.en: having an uneven or bumpy surface, not smooth

ex.en: The rock had a rough surface.
ex.ko: 그 바위는 거친 표면을 가지고 있었다.

existing.en: not exact or precise, only approximate

ex.en: Can you give me a rough estimate of the cost?

wn.def: found in the ordinary course of events

existing.en: the usual set of things you do regularly, especially every day

ex.en: Exercise is part of her daily routine.

existing.en: a white substance used to flavor or preserve food

ex.en: Add a pinch of salt to the soup.

wn.def: bringing about salvation or redemption from sin

existing.en: money that you keep instead of spending, or the act of not spending money

ex.en: She puts some of her salary into savings every month.

existing.en: an amount of money or time that is not used or wasted

ex.en: Buying in bulk gives a saving of about 15%.
ex.ko: 대량으로 사면 약 15%를 절약할 수 있다.

wn.def: form intrigues (for) in an underhand manner
devise a system or form a scheme for

existing.en: an organized plan or system for doing something

ex.en: The government introduced a new pension scheme.

existing.en: a secret or dishonest plan

ex.en: He was involved in a scheme to defraud investors.

wn.def: educate in or as if in a school
teach or refine to be discriminative in taste or judgment
swim in or form a large group of fish

existing.en: a place where children go to learn

ex.en: He walks to school every morning.

wn.def: create by shaping stone or wood or any other hard material
shape (a material like stone or wood) by whittling away at it

existing.en: a work of art made by carving or shaping stone, wood, or another material

ex.en: The museum displays ancient Greek sculptures.
ex.ko: 그 박물관은 고대 그리스 조각품을 전시한다.

wn.def: place ceremoniously or formally in an office or position
put a seat on a chair
place or attach firmly in or on a base
place in or on a seat

existing.en: a place where you can sit

ex.en: Please take a seat.

wn.def: (used as a combining form) relating to--of or by or to or from or for--the self

existing.en: a person's own individual identity or nature

ex.en: She wants to find her true self.

wn.def: determine the order of constituents in

existing.en: the order in which things happen or are arranged

ex.en: Follow the correct sequence of steps.

existing.en: a series of related shots or events in a film

ex.en: The chase sequence was thrilling to watch.
ex.ko: 그 추격 장면은 손에 땀을 쥐게 했다.

wn.def: compel through a sense of shame
surpass or beat by a wide margin

existing.en: a painful feeling caused by knowing you have done something wrong or foolish

ex.en: He felt shame after lying to his friend.
ex.ko: 그는 친구에게 거짓말한 것에 대해 부끄러움을 느꼈다.

existing.en: something disappointing or unfortunate

ex.en: It's a shame you can't come to the party.

existing.en: complete and total, used to emphasize something

ex.en: It was sheer luck that we found the place.
ex.ko: 우리가 그곳을 찾은 건 순전히 운이었다.

existing.en: rising or falling very steeply, almost straight up or down

ex.en: The sheer cliff dropped straight into the sea.

existing.en: (of fabric) so thin that light passes through it

ex.en: She wore a sheer white blouse.
ex.ko: 그녀는 속이 비치는 흰색 블라우스를 입었다.

wn.def: protect, hide, or conceal from danger or harm
hold back a thought or feeling about

existingFlat.en: a protective covering or structure

ex.en: The soldier carried a shield.

existing.en: a piece of clothing worn on the upper body, often with a collar and buttons

ex.en: He wore a blue shirt to the interview.
ex.ko: 그는 면접에 파란 셔츠를 입고 갔다.

wn.def: carry a burden, either real or metaphoric

existing.en: the part of the body between the neck and the arm

ex.en: She carried the bag on her shoulder.

existingFlat.en: raise one's shoulders to indicate indifference or resignation

ex.en: She shrugged her shoulders.

existing.cue: 말하는 것을 멈추고 (구어체, 무례할 수 있음)
existing.en: stop talking (often used as a rude command)

ex.en: Just shut up and listen for a second!

existing.en: make someone stop talking

ex.en: He tried to shut her up before she said too much.
ex.ko: 그는 그녀가 말을 너무 많이 하기 전에 입을 다물게 하려 했다.

existing.en: nervous or uncomfortable around other people, especially people you don't know

ex.en: The little boy was too shy to say hello.
ex.ko: 그 어린 남자아이는 너무 수줍어서 인사를 못 했다.

existing.en: suffering from an illness or feeling unwell

ex.en: She stayed home because she was sick.

existing.en: annoyed or bored because you have had too much of something

ex.en: I'm sick of this rainy weather.
ex.ko: 나는 이 비 오는 날씨가 지긋지긋하다.

existing.en: a position to the left or right of something, or one surface of an object

ex.en: He stood on the other side of the room.

existing.en: one of two or more groups that are opposed in a contest or argument

ex.en: Which side are you on?

wn.def: take aim by looking through the sights of a gun (or other device)

existing.en: the ability to see

ex.en: Her sight is not as good as it used to be.

existing.en: something interesting or beautiful that you see, especially somewhere you are visiting

ex.en: The Grand Canyon is an amazing sight.

existing.en: a hit in baseball that allows the batter to reach first base safely

ex.en: He hit a single to left field.

existing.en: not married

ex.en: She has been single for two years.

existing.en: only one; not more than one

ex.en: I didn't see a single mistake in his work.
ex.ko: 나는 그의 작업에서 실수를 단 하나도 보지 못했다.

existing.en: how big or small something is

ex.en: What size shoes do you wear?

wn.def: avoid or try to avoid fulfilling, answering, or performing (duties, questions, or issues)
extend on all sides of simultaneously

existing.en: a piece of clothing worn by women and girls that hangs from the waist

ex.en: She wore a blue skirt to school.
ex.ko: 그녀는 학교에 파란 치마를 입고 갔다.

existingFlat.en: brown-speckled European lark noted for singing while hovering at a great height

ex.en: A skylark sang high above the field.

wn.def: beat severely with a whip or rod

existingFlat.en: a wound made by cutting

ex.en: The company announced a price slash.
ex.ko: 그 회사는 대폭적인 가격 삭감을 발표했어요.

wn.def: kill a large number of people indiscriminately

existingFlat.en: the killing of animals (as for food)

ex.en: The animals are raised for slaughter.

existing.en: a narrow opening for putting something into, such as a coin or a letter

ex.en: Put a coin in the slot to start the machine.

existing.en: a particular time or place in a schedule or system

ex.en: I booked a slot for 3 p.m.

wn.def: the slender part of the back
a garment size for a small person

existing.en: not large in size or amount

ex.en: They live in a small apartment.

existing.en: having or showing intelligence

ex.en: She is a smart student.

existing.en: neat and stylish in appearance

ex.en: He looked smart in his new suit.
ex.ko: 그는 새 정장을 입어 단정해 보였다.

wn.def: a serious collision (especially of motor vehicles)
a hard return hitting the tennis ball above your head
the act of colliding with something

existingFlat.en: hit hard

ex.en: He smashed the window.

wn.def: make smooth or smoother, as if by rubbing

existing.en: having an even surface, without bumps or roughness

ex.en: The baby's skin was soft and smooth.

existing.en: happening without problems or difficulties

ex.en: We had a smooth flight to Tokyo.

wn.def: move smoothly and sinuously, like a snake

existing.en: a long, thin reptile with no legs that moves by sliding along the ground

ex.en: A snake crossed the path in front of us.
ex.ko: 뱀 한 마리가 우리 앞의 길을 가로질렀다.

wn.def: the act of catching an object with the hands

existingFlat.en: utter in an angry, sharp, or abrupt tone

ex.en: She snapped at him in frustration.

existingFlat.en: a facial expression of contempt or scorn

ex.en: He gave a sneer of contempt.

wn.def: the process of becoming softened and saturated as a consequence of being immersed in water (or other liquid)
the act of making something completely wet
washing something by allowing it to soak

existing.en: completely wet, often used before 'wet' for emphasis

ex.en: Come in, you're soaking wet!

wn.def: a party of people assembled to promote sociability and communal activity

existing.en: relating to society, or relating to friendly activities with other people

ex.en: She has a busy social life.

existing.en: a piece of clothing worn on the foot, inside a shoe

ex.en: He put on a pair of clean socks.
ex.ko: 그는 깨끗한 양말 한 켤레를 신었다.

existing.en: not hard or firm; pleasant to touch

ex.en: The pillow is very soft.

existing.en: quiet or gentle in sound

ex.en: She spoke in a soft voice.

existing.en: kind and gentle in character

ex.en: He has a soft heart when it comes to animals.

wn.def: matter that is solid at room temperature and pressure
the state in which a substance has no tendency to flow under moderate stress

existing.en: having a firm shape and structure, not liquid or gas

ex.en: Water becomes solid when it freezes.

existing.en: strong and firmly made

ex.en: They built a solid wooden table.

existing.en: reliable and based on good reasons or evidence

ex.en: The police have solid evidence against him.
ex.ko: 경찰은 그에 대한 확실한 증거를 가지고 있다.
